Milki Launcher
Main Navigation HomeGuide

Appearance

Your phone.
Your rules.

BETA

Milki Launcher is a search-first Android launcher that replaces mindless scrolling with instant access. Find apps, files, contacts, and anything else — all from one search bar. No ads. No tracking. No paywalls.

|
Find any app instantly
Download APK Read the Guide →
Open Source on GitHub
Zero tracking
100% free, forever
Data stays on device

Built around how you think.

Every feature in Milki is designed to get you from thought to action in the fewest possible steps.

The Omnibar

One search bar to rule them all.

Tap the home button and a powerful search dialog slides up. Recent apps appear instantly. Start typing and results narrow in real time — apps, web, actions. No drawer-diving, no folder-hunting.

Prefixes

Type a letter. Search anywhere.

Prefixes are Milki's superpower. Type f to search files on your device. Type c to find and call contacts. Type yt to search YouTube. Create your own prefixes for Wikipedia, DuckDuckGo, or anything else. Each prefix gets its own color, so you always know where you're searching.

Your Homescreen

Not just apps. Everything.

Pin apps, files, contacts, and widgets directly to your homescreen. Drag anything from search results onto the grid. Two widget modes — inline for always-visible, popup for space-efficient. Customize gestures for swipe and tap actions.

Everything else you'd expect.

🧩

Two Widget Modes

Inline widgets live on your grid. Popup widgets hide behind an icon and expand on tap — space-efficient and always accessible.

👆

Custom Gestures

Map swipe up, swipe down, single tap, or double tap to any action: open an app, lock the screen, show notifications, and more.

🌐

Bilingual Prefixes

Create multiple prefixes for the same service in different languages. Search Wikipedia in English with "w" and in Arabic with "و".

📌

Drag Anything to Home

Long-press any search result — app, file, contact, shortcut — and drag it straight to your homescreen.

Ready to take control?

Milki is free, open source, and built for people who value their time and privacy. Try it — you'll wonder how you ever used anything else.
